name: XL Multipurpose Storage Bin Clear - Brightroom™: Polypropylene Utility, 1499 Volume, 9.75" H, 15" W, 10.25" D
description:
Keep your everyday essentials organized and easily accessible with this Extra Large Multipurpose Storage Bin from Brightroom™. The plastic storage bin features a spacious design to provide ample space for universal storage, and the clear design makes it an easy pairing with other decor. Complete with side cutouts for easy carrying from room to room, this multipurpose bin is great for stowing away extra towels, linens or blankets to keep your home looking neat and tidy.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.

Overall Width: 15 inches
Overall Height: 9.75 inches
Overall Depth: 10.25 inches
Interior Width: 14.9 inches
Interior Depth: 10.13 inches
Bottom Width: 14.25 inches
Bottom Depth: 9.45 inches
